RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS C NEUWELT AND EAST BAY RHEUMATOLOGY MEDICAL GROUP, INC'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE to Alameda County is granted pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 395(a) because all of the Defendants reside in Alameda County. The court did not award sanction. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Continued To Apr-09-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs C NEUWELT and EAST BAY RHEUMATOLOGY MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'s MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is continued to April 9, 2014, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its opposition papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
